Brilliant Sword of Faith  
 

Lore Item No Trade Quest Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 44
DMG: 20 Dmg Bonus: 152
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
MANA: +50
WT: 10.0 Size: LARGE
Class: PAL
Race: HUM ERU HIE HEF DWF HFL GNM FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 44
DMG: 20 Dmg Bonus: 152

Stackable:No

Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live

Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 40
[Quests | Comments ]

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

West Freeport
Quest Name
Zimel's Blades (Quest for SoulFire)
Part of the Fiery Avenger Quest.

BAH
QuoteReply
# Mar 16 2003 at 11:28 PM Rating: Decent

100 posts
I killed all the guards up to him and pulled him to the zone soloed him to 25%hp and had to zone i only had 10%hp. that was at lvl 51 pally
▲ Page top
RE: BAH
QuoteReply
# Jun 10 2003 at 12:59 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591775650081
View User Forum
13 posts
I was about to have a guildy, 64 pally, solo him for me... but when the puller went to pull him, she found both corpses just laying there on the ground with 1 minute left on the timer. I looted the testiment and that was that. Weirdest thing I've ever seen... this was last night on prexus... so thanks to whoever killed him. =)

Aurind
40 Paladin
Sword of Fate (Prexus)
▲ Page top
Drop rate??
QuoteReply
# Feb 20 2003 at 2:18 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591786330852
3 posts
Does Lucan Drop the sword everytime i jus got finished killing him and his skelly and only the testimony and a few FS swords dropped
▲ Page top
RE: Drop rate??
QuoteReply
# Feb 20 2003 at 12:43 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591765923498
Guru
170 posts
No. Sir Lucan does not drop the sword. You have to turn in his testimony to Valeron in North FP to get the sword.
▲ Page top
RE: Drop rate??
QuoteReply
# Feb 20 2003 at 1:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591786330852
3 posts
i noticed that just after i posted thank you very much ;)
▲ Page top
To easy
QuoteReply
# Feb 09 2003 at 5:52 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592256858534
10 posts
Me (52 druid at the time) and a friend (52 necro) did him together a few weeks back.

was realy easy. i pulled the guards from in front of the house. Killed them with his pet alone =p. I invised waljked to his room, agroed him. ran to pull spot ( the 2nd zone to nfp left side..by the lady that sells sewing stuff). ran to the back wall casted snare...had friend fear sent pet in doted i nuked..minute later he was dead. skely form was easy same tastics.
we made a paly VERY happy. =)
▲ Page top
Lucan Dlere
QuoteReply
# Jan 21 2003 at 1:03 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592256325281
12 posts
I took Lucan Dlere down on the 15th of January with a group of 4, I think it took a max of 4 minutes to take him and his skeelie with the 4 of us. Me 40th Paladin. Tuamac, Clatto, and one more.
▲ Page top
pretty easy...
QuoteReply
# Dec 15 2002 at 3:03 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592255884283
View User Forum
27 posts
41 pally (me), 48 monk, and a 48 cleric took him down very easy..what we did was have the monk cheaply buffed and SoW at the end. then ran into sir lucan's room and FD'ed. he put on his fungi to heal and once he got to full i opened the doors and he ran out and trained all of the guards. i then started to hail sir lucan and he stopped but everytime he saw a rat or something he ran to kill it which led him to gates...so the monk which was iksar ran to the guards to get agro and brought him to the very corner near pop book. he FD'ed again and waited for the other guards to leave while i hailed sir lucan and once the other guards left the monk started to fight. once the monk was almost dead...at around 20%, sir lucan was at 80. he FD'ed and the cleric CH'ed him cuz he didnt want a faction hit. the monk got back up and started to fight again until sir lucan started to run. once he started to run the monk told me to root him..i tried but he kept resisting. i didnt really need to root cuz it wouldent work so i got the faction hit =(. once he died the undead popped and i finally started to do some work...i had the condemnation of rodcet nife spell and with a DEX of 96 i proced 4 times =D. we killed him very easy and i got the agro at the end and lost 1 bub while the monk also lost 1 bub. after that i looted the testimony and logged. i forgot to give it to the lady person for the sword but ill do that today...BTW we killed him yesterday 12-14-02.
▲ Page top
Easy
QuoteReply
# Nov 19 2002 at 9:56 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592253988747
8 posts
Took Lucan solo with my 55 Mage. Let a nooby loot the sword, he was pretty happy.

who do i turn this into? i am not sure what to do and accidentally turned all of the items, and the testimony, instead of the sword to bro hayle......please inform me as of who to turn this into
▲ Page top
Simple
QuoteReply
# Aug 12 2002 at 9:34 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591777534728
21 posts
Took out Lucan a little while ago and he couldn't have been more easy. Had a 54 monk 51 druid and 40 paladin(me). Monk pulled him and zoned. I hailed him till all the guards went back then monk zoned back in and we beat him to death. Druid had to heal the monk around 2 times. I LoH him to full life before we zoned. Monk finished off lucan then killed the undead version before we could even zone back in. Really thought he would have put up a bigger fight
▲ Page top
Lucan
QuoteReply
# Jul 15 2002 at 11:17 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591751709415
4 posts
Did this with me *45 pally*, 51 pally, 50 warrior, 56 shammy, 44ish druid, and 52 chanter... Shammy pulled him single and he went down easy, before he died, the shammy and warrior zoned *so no faction hit* and we killed the undead version easy without them... very easy was fun to kill that evil ex-pally :)
▲ Page top
Sir Lucan
QuoteReply
# Jul 04 2002 at 10:07 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759453850
1 post
Killed him today it was easy with a 52 Pally, 52 Monk, and a 52 Cleric. Took both him and his skeleton out with minimal dmg to group.

He's not too tough.

Killed him with a 45 druid, 45 pally(me), 55 shammy, and a 56 warrior. Didnt even need to heal the warrior much at all.

Though we didnt have brother Jentry healing him so maybe thats why.
▲ Page top
RE: Sir Lucan DLere
QuoteReply
# Jun 17 2002 at 12:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254445523
7 posts
We took him out with a lvl 50 monk, lvl 48 monk, lvl 47 shaman, and lvl 48 cleric. Since we were already kos to freeport militia the really big positive faction hit with the nfp guards was great. Some lucky pally even got his item for free. :) the skelle version of him was a joke. I think the cleric only C-healed twice during the fight.
▲ Page top
RE: Sir Lucan DLere
QuoteReply
# Jan 24 2002 at 3:28 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591759399407
26 posts
Took him out easy with a 59 paladin, 55 paladin, 45 monk and 56 ranger. He's not really that hard. We didn't even have a healer.
▲ Page top
RE: Sir Lucan DLere
QuoteReply
# Apr 02 2002 at 10:13 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591770561065
119 posts
Did this weekend, we had
40 Paladin (Myself)
39 Mage w/ fire pet
38 Ranger
42 Ranger
46 Druid
38 Warrior

He was beat down decently fast. Not a single
death. Most of the party zoned before he died (as not to lose faction) The skelly was almost the
end of us as we were OOM and hurt pretty bad going into the fight (No cleric) and having zoned, our mage could not conjure a pet in time.

It was truly an excellent battle for such in important item. My only problem was explaining to ambitious < lvl 20s that they could not assist. (Do to the inherit death and aggro problems accompanying such a battle)

Sure does look cool :) I carry it when traveling and switch to good ol arby (GS) for battle.
▲ Page top
RE: Sir Lucan DLere

# Dec 14 2001 at 12:24 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591769261394
View User Forum
34 posts
I was wondering if anyone knows for sure if you get the faction hit, after you kill him, or after you kill his undead form, or both. I'm assuming after killing his live form, but just want to make sure for the sake of my fellow guild members that will be assisting me. Appreciate any info regarding this; and no I will not try to forgo the faction hit, so please no posts telling me how to avoid it.

#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 20 2001 at 11:42 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) sir lucan spawns as un dead mosnter afte ryou kill kill him he runs every where in the freeport milliushu to get his guard frineds your best bet to kill him is to ask the guild wraith to help you
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 06 2001 at 9:48 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) HAhaha ...
Faction
QuoteReply
# May 17 2001 at 2:18 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1593965837258
View User Forum
5 posts
Killing Sir Lucan does destroy your faction with the Freeport Militia, and the Freeport Rogues. The Freeport Militia, and Sir Lucan Dlere are corrupt and evil. This is why it is not only just and right, but the DUTY of any Paladin that can, to bring them to justice.
▲ Page top
Faction
QuoteReply
# May 14 2001 at 2:48 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I assume killing Lucan destroys your faction in Freeport. Is the any way to get it back? Also how is just and right for a palladin to complete this quest??
▲ Page top
RE: Faction
QuoteReply
# May 12 2002 at 6:18 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361962372
2 posts
In order to fix faction with the Freeport Militia... Go to Highhold Pass and Hunt Gnolls and Orcs. Turn Gnoll Scalps into Captain Orben. Orc scalps to the NPC near Kith Zone. This is long and annoying work b/c the scalps don't drop very often, and most people won't sell them unless you offer them some ridiculous price. It raises faction with a few of the shadier groups without damaging faction with any of the god guys.

Fearfactory Bloodangel <Divine Loyalty>
38th High Elf Paladin Of Tunare
The Seventh Hammer Server
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 14 2001 at 2:47 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I assume killing Lucan destriys your faction in Freeport. Is the any way to get it back? Also how is just and right for a palladin to complete this quest??
lucan level
